creator: beat@chruetertee.ch
text:
Add support for Huawei E180v 3G modem:

	# usbconfig | grep HUAWEI
	ugen6.2: <HUAWEI Mobile HUAWEI Technology> at usbus6, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON
	# usbconfig -u 6 -a 2 dump_device_desc | grep id
	idVendor = 0x12d1 
	idProduct = 0x140c

	Functional testing successful with up to date CURRENT and attached patch.
